news.headline: Confusion over Melania Trump's bizarrely-timed Jeffrey Epstein disavowal
news.summary: PRESS REVIEW – Friday, April 10: Papers focus on Hungary’s opposition leader, Peter Magyar, as he confronts Prime Minister Viktor Orban in Sunday’s crucial election. news.headline: Lebanon: Images of a Nation Uprooted by War
news.summary: A million people in Lebanon have fled their homes as Israel clashes anew with Hezbollah. This is what their lives look now.
